title: PokéAPI Resource Identity, URL Construction, Pagination, and Fair Use · Execution Trace: Pokedex Go Fixed Origin Policy
summary: The client concatenates user input into arbitrary URLs, treats list and detail resources alike, ignores pagination links, and sends repeated requests despite the API fair-use cache request. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex go fixed origin policy increment in fixed-origin PokéAPI resource and fair-use policy. Learners progress th…
